textPlain: I’ve tried different domain mcps in the past with limited success. Each time I found a good domain and went to register it I found it had premium pricing and was like $500++Curious if this has anything setup to avoid that?

Hey HN! I built this because I got tired of context-switching between AI assistants and domain registrars while brainstorming project names.Now I just ask "Is coolproject.com available?" and get instant results with pricing from multiple sources.Technical details:
- TypeScript + Zod validation
- 98 tests, security audited
- LRU cache with TTL
- Rate limiting per registrarHappy to answer any questions about the architecture or MCP in general!
